docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, CARMEN C/O CUNNINGHAM AS TO DEFENDANT PRIMARY ASSET SERVICES, INC. LAKEWOOD APTS AKA T&S REALTY CO. FDBA OAKWOOD APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE ATTORNEY'S EMPLOYEE, FATIMA BRAZIL, FILED A DECLARATION. RE: THE DEFENDANTS WERE NOT SERVED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRIMARY ASSET SERVICES, INC.

CON'T REQUEST BY PLFT CARMEN RAMOREZ VIA MESSENGER FILED. SENT TO COURT FOR AN ORDER. $10.00 FEE PAID BY CHECK.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, CARMEN C/O CUNNINGHAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAKEWOOD APTS AKA T&S REALTY CO. FDBA OAKWOOD APARTMENTS $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.00, PRIMARY ASSET SERVICES, INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
